title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Britannia Industries - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Britannia Industries - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Britannia Industries has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Vijayawada office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Britannia Industries:
Britannia Industries is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Britannia Industries!
